globalScale: Can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases aimed at the satisfaction of needs of a concrete type.

reading: Can understand very short, simple texts a single phrase at a time.
listening: Can recognise familiar words and very basic phrases concerning themselves and their family.
writing: Can write a short, simple postcard and fill in personal details on forms.
speaking: Can interact in a simple way provided the other person talks slowly and clearly.
interaction: Can ask and answer questions about personal details.
